title: Customise text in dropdown instructions on WorkForms
excerpt: We are an international company, and use WorkForms for collecting information from partners and clients around the world. We can translate the text of our forms, but there isn’t a way to change the default text in, for e…

posts.author: MeghanPM (Meghan)
posts.cookedHtml: We are an international company, and use WorkForms for collecting information from partners and clients around the world. We can translate the text of our forms, but there isn’t a way to change the default text in, for example, dropdown questions. It would be really helpful if we could update that text so that “Select your answer” could be translated into other languages - not just the default based on the language of our company account. Sometimes we need to use multiple forms to capture input from multiple language groups, and having English instructions in these areas makes it less user-friendly.
